body.message: Complete LOCK 015 addendum now available. GPT tightened the spec based on all three reviews.
key_changes: Data source: manual metadata ONLY. No filesystem scanning.
No config file reading — ephemeral in/out
Frozen status enum: NOT_READY, PARTIAL_GOVERNANCE_READY, GOVERNANCE_SPINE_READY, RUNTIME_PREP_READY
RUNTIME_PREP_READY exists but NEVER returned in LOCK 015
Capabilities derived from PASS locks only
Safety boundaries (human-readable) vs safety_flags (booleans, all false)
Forbidden imports: http, fetch, openai, sqlite, express, etc.
Drift scan for forbidden patterns required
your_feedback_incorporated: Deterministic readiness_id formula → ACCEPTED (hash of sorted locks)
Status enum defined and frozen → ACCEPTED
Capabilities tied to completed locks → ACCEPTED
Safety boundaries vs flags clarified → ACCEPTED
